General.Name: Republic Airways Holdings Inc
General.Description: Republic Airways Holdings Inc. provides scheduled passenger services. The company operates a fleet of approximately 275 aircraft and offers scheduled passenger service with 1,300 daily flights to 130 cities across the United States, Canada, the Caribbean, and Mexico. Republic Airways Holdings Inc. was founded in 1974 and is based in Carmel, Indiana.
General.Address: 2 Brickyard Lane, Carmel, IN, United States, 46032
